title: Spawner Upgrades
description: A datapack that allows you to collect spawners with silk touch, and/or upgrade them with craftable custom items.
body:
# Spawner Upgrades

**Fabric version of this datapack with a lot more functionality :**\
[https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-spawners-expanded](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-spawners-expanded)

This datapack aims to give players more freedom when using mob spawners. You will be able to customize and upgrade any mob spawners using new craftable items, as well as displace them using the existing Silk Touch enchantment.

_**You have to use the resource pack while using this datapack or else every custom items will look glitched. You can dowload it by clicking the latest version in the 'versions' tab.**_

## New Items
_To use these items, simply aim a spawner or a mob and use right click._
### Soul Desintegrator
![Soul Desintegrator Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a19b813791c671852db10263143fe9bd400e67a.png)

This item is used to reset the current mob type of a spawner.
### Spawner Igniter
![Spawner Igniter Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7185b2a242302170995b75ae5e6ef990f45b48c2.png)

This item is used to activate a freshly placed spawner, it is necessary after breaking one.
### Cursed Bottle
![Cursed Bottle Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e502c0f2a508cbdcd1a9d68ab14d5a6dc47cd4ac.png)

This item is used to catch a mob "soul" to later fill a spawner. Right click one of the compatible mobs to catch it. Once you have a Soul in a Bottle, you can right click an empty lit spawner to set its mob type.
### Crowd Upgrade
![Crowd Upgrade Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/932b0d23ca9f6e7697db9c9837ddbfde03944963.png)

This upgrade will increase the spawner mob cap up to 18 entities instead of 6.
### Range Upgrade
![Range Upgrade Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77551d7770516f62a804c7db4274e4a1ebac3c8b.png)

This upgrade will increase the required player range of the spawner from 16 to 64 blocks.
### Speed Upgrade
![Speed Upgrade Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e370c6d3869dcf3b3058cfc7a12f342062159b71.png)

This upgrade will decrease the time between each spawn cycle of the spawner.

## Compatible Mobs
There are 18 compatible mobs which can be used in a spawner :
- Creeper
- Zombie
- Skeleton
- Spider
- Blaze
- Cave Spider
- Silverfish
- Magma Cube
- Drowned
- Enderman
- Hoglin
- Husk
- Slime
- Stray
- Witch
- Wither Skeleton
- Zombified Piglin
- Bogged
